message.content: Can you help me set up the project? My email is john.smith@acmecorp.com and the repo is at /home/jsmith/projects/myapp

content.text: Sure! I can see the project at /home/jsmith/projects/myapp. Let me take a look at the structure and help you configure it.
The config file should point to our staging server at db.acmecorp.internal:5432 and the API endpoint is https://api.acmecorp.com/v2/data
I'll configure the connection to db.acmecorp.internal:5432 and set the API endpoint to https://api.acmecorp.com/v2/data. Let me update the config file at /home/jsmith/projects/myapp/config.yaml
